div.class: max-w-theme mx-auto px-5 md:px-8 lg:px-12 w-full mt-6 mb-1.5
bg-gradient-to-br from-surface via-surface to-card border border-border rounded-theme p-6 md:p-8 flex flex-col justify-center min-h-[180px] md:min-h-[220px] shadow-card relative overflow-hidden
absolute -right-10 -top-10 w-40 h-40 bg-primary/5 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none
announcement-content relative z-10 max-w-3xl flex flex-col justify-center items-start gap-2.5
